title: tanacetum ferulaceum
intro: Tanacetum ferulaceum, also known as Yellow Tansy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Tanacetum ferulaceum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and discomfort, and support the immune system. Tanacetum ferulaceum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
